---
title: "group_2_raw_activations_plots"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ggforce)
library(ggridges)
options(scipen = 999)
library(colorspace)
library(glue)
library(fs)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r}

# ─── Set feature here  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
feature          <- 7986
activations_csv  <- glue("../../data/concept_groups/stats/group_2/feature_{feature}_activations_ALL.csv")
pos_domain_csv   <- "../../data/concept_groups/sequences/group_2/training/group_2_positive_domain.csv"
output_dir       <- glue("../../figures/group_2/feature_{feature}/")

```

```{r}
# ─── loading activations and cleavage site data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
activations_df <- read_csv(activations_csv, col_types = cols(
  Entry    = col_character(),
  position = col_integer(),
  activation = col_double()
))

pos_domains_df <- read_csv(pos_domain_csv, col_types = cols(
  Entry          = col_character(),
  residue_number = col_integer(),
  domain_id      = col_integer()   # whatever your domain file has
))

```

# Note: when I skip the following code block, my plots for all entries have more blue activation bars
```{r}
# activations_df <- activations_df %>%
#   #filter(Entry == c("Q9XVX1", "A0A1L2F565", "P56717", "Q16992", "Q9NL82", "Q93702"))
#   filter(Entry %in% c("P10419", "A0A1L2F565"))
```

```{r}
# ─── setup output folder if it does not exist  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir_create(output_dir, recurse = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ─── plotting function that also saves plots to output folder ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
plot_and_save_entry <- function(entry_id) {
  # 1) Extract this protein’s activations
  df_e <- activations_df %>%
    filter(Entry == entry_id)
  
  # 2) Build a tiny data.frame of rectangles for each cleavage site
  clefts <- pos_domains_df %>%
    filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
    pull(residue_number) %>%
    unique()
  
  # get the residue & position of each cleavage site
  cleft_labels <- pos_domains_df %>%
  filter(Entry == entry_id) %>%
  distinct(residue_number, residue) 
    
  # 2) Sequence length & y-limits
  seq_len   <- max(df_e$position)
  y_max     <- max(df_e$activation, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_limit   <- if (y_max == 0) 1 else y_max * 1.2
  
  
  # 4) X‐axis breaks: 
  x_by <- case_when(
  seq_len > 500 ~ 50,
  seq_len > 350 ~ 40,
  seq_len > 100 ~ 20,
  TRUE          ~ 10
  )
  
  x_breaks <- seq(0, seq_len, by = x_by)

  # 5) Pick top‐50 activations (non‐zero) for labeling
  label_df <- df_e %>%
    filter(activation > 0) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = activation, n = 10)
  
  tick_h <- y_limit * 0.015
  tick_v <- -0.015
  minor_ticks <- tibble(
    x    = seq(0.5, seq_len + 0.5, by = 1),
    y    = 0,                  # baseline
    yend = -tick_h             # extend downward
  )

  
  rects <- tibble(
    xmin = clefts - 0.5,
    xmax = clefts + 0.5,
    ymin = -Inf,
    ymax = Inf
  )
  
  # 3) Build the plot
  p <- ggplot(df_e, aes(x = position, y = activation)) + 
    # neon-green background for the cleavage sites
    geom_rect(
      data = rects,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
      fill  = "#39FF14",   # neon green
      color = "gray70",
      size     = 0.1,
      alpha = 0.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_col(
      fill = "steelblue",
      color = "gray70",
      size     = 0.1,
      width = 1,
      alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    # geom_vline(
    #   xintercept = seq(0.5, seq_len + 0.5, by = 1),
    #   color      = "gray70",
    #   size       = 0.1
    # ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = label_df,
      aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", activation)),
      nudge_y       = y_limit * 0.01,  # a little space above the bar
      size          = 2,
      segment.size  = 0,             # thin connector lines
      max.overlaps  = Inf,          
      box.padding   = 0.1,
      point.padding = 0.1,
      direction     = "y"
    ) 
    

    # conditional: use repel if long
  if (seq_len > 200) {
    p <- p +
      geom_text_repel(
        data = cleft_labels,
        aes(x = residue_number, y = 0, label = residue),
        nudge_y       = 0.05,
        direction     = "y",
        segment.size  = 0,
        box.padding   = 0.05,
        point.padding = 0.05,
        size          = 1.4
      )
  } else {
    p <- p +
      geom_text(
        data = cleft_labels,
        aes(x = residue_number, y = 0, label = residue),
        vjust = 1.1,
        size  = 1.4
        
      )
  }
    
    
    
p <- p  +  
  # geom_text(
  #     data = cleft_labels,
  #     aes(x = residue_number, y = 0, label = residue),
  #     vjust = 0.5,                # push below the baseline
  #     size  = 1.7,
  #     color    = "black"
  #   ) +
    geom_segment(
      data       = minor_ticks,
      aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y, yend = yend),
      color      = "gray70",
      size       = 0.2,
      inherit.aes=FALSE
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
    #geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = x_breaks,
      #minor_breaks= seq(0.5, seq_len+0.5, by = 1),
      limits = c(0.5, seq_len+0.5),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(-tick_h, y_limit),
      breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 6),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = glue("Feature {feature}: {entry_id}"),
      x     = "Residue Position",
      y     = "Activation"
    ) +
    #theme_cowplot() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major   = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      axis.line   = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.x     = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.y     = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      
      # (optional) nudge the x labels so they don’t overlap the ticks
      axis.text.x        = element_text(margin = margin(t = 4), color = "black"),
      axis.text.y     = element_text(color = "black"),
      
      plot.title         = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
      )

  
  # 4) Save
  out_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(entry_id, ".png"))
  ggsave(out_file, p, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
}
```


```{r}
# ─── apply function to all Entries ────────────────────────────────────────────────
unique(activations_df$Entry) %>% 
  walk(plot_and_save_entry)

```
